Solution 08

Mobile Security Solutions

Mobile Device Management and mobile threat defence solutions for comprehensive control, visibility, and security across all corporate and BYOD mobile devices.

Key Vendors & Brands

Click any brand to see product details

CH
Check Point Mobile Threat Defence
＋ View details
CH

Check Point

Mobile Threat Defence

Check Point Harmony Mobile provides on-device mobile threat defence -- detecting malware, network attacks, and OS vulnerabilities on iOS and Android without impacting user privacy.

Key Features

  • On-device machine learning threat detection
  • Network threat prevention (MITM attack detection)
  • OS vulnerability assessment
  • Phishing protection for all browsers and apps
  • Integration with major MDM platforms

Use Cases

  • ✓ Detect mobile malware that MDM alone cannot find
  • ✓ Block man-in-the-middle attacks on corporate Wi-Fi
  • ✓ Get alerted when employee devices are running vulnerable OS versions
Why CrewTEC recommends Check Point

Mobile threat defence fills the gap that MDM leaves. CrewTEC deploys Check Point Harmony Mobile integrated with your existing MDM for complete mobile security.

Interested in Check Point? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Check Point →
SO
SOTI Enterprise MDM / EMM
＋ View details
SO

SOTI

Enterprise MDM / EMM

SOTI MobiControl is an enterprise mobility management platform managing the full lifecycle of mobile and IoT devices -- from enrolment to retirement -- across iOS, Android, Windows, and Linux.

Key Features

  • Over-the-air enrolment (zero-touch for Android, DEP for iOS)
  • App lifecycle management and enterprise app store
  • Remote control and troubleshooting
  • Rugged device and IoT management
  • Geofencing and location tracking

Use Cases

  • ✓ Manage thousands of field devices for logistics and delivery teams
  • ✓ Deploy and update enterprise apps silently without user interaction
  • ✓ Remotely troubleshoot rugged devices in warehouses or factories
Why CrewTEC recommends SOTI

SOTI is the leader in rugged and IoT device management. CrewTEC deploys SOTI for enterprises managing large fleets of field devices, rugged handhelds, and industrial IoT endpoints.

Interested in SOTI? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for SOTI →

What We Help You Achieve

  • ✓ Enrol and manage corporate and BYOD mobile devices
  • ✓ Detect and remediate mobile malware and phishing attacks
  • ✓ Enforce device compliance policies before granting access
  • ✓ Remotely wipe lost or stolen corporate devices
  • ✓ Manage rugged devices, kiosks, and IoT endpoints

Key Features

Over-the-air device enrolment and configuration

App distribution and lifecycle management

Real-time threat detection on device

Geofencing and location-based policies

Containerisation for BYOD data separation
